metadata.description: Agent skill markdowns for Claude Code — the agent-loops toolkit: a foundation playbook plus build / review / plan / infra mode plugins for autonomous, self-verifying agent work.

plugins.name: agent-loops
plugins.description: Foundation: the project-agnostic operating manual for autonomous agent work — the four-station loop, machine-checkable /goal conditions, adversarial verify panels, context budgeting, overnight-lane provisioning, the harvest retro, and the self-improving retro station. The brain the mode plugins rest on.

plugins.name: engine
plugins.description: Build mode: designs a gate that can prove a task done (and can fail), gets human sign-off on the target, then builds and self-verifies until green — stopping at a committed slice.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Review mode: the loop with findings as the product — audits, security sweeps, deep reviews. Adversarial refute-panels, mandatory repros (no repro = no finding), loop-until-dry with an honest coverage map.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning mode: the loop with a spec/plan as the artifact — grounding checks, a premortem panel, every phase names its gate. Emits a machine-checkable plan that build mode consumes.

plugins.name: infra
plugins.description: Infra mode: the loop pointed at system state — migrations, deploys, backfills. The guardrail harness comes first: parity harness, dry-run diff, canary, rehearsed rollback, smallest blast radius.
